case_title: A LARAIA CYNTHIA C/O DIVE DISCOVERY TRAVEL VS ARMSTRONG GAYNELL O/C SUPERVISOR WILLIE KENNEDY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A LARAIA CYNTHIA C/O DIVE DISCOVERY TRAVEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG GAYNELL O/C SUPERVISOR WILLIE KENNEDY NO EVID.
